name: quantapay-2024
brief_text: QuantaPay — a consumer fintech app for recurring payments and subscriptions. Stripe-based billing with subscription tiers, invoices, and webhooks; secure account auth with JWT and TOTP two-factor; PCI-aware payment flows. The reusable assets are the Stripe payment + subscription engine and the auth/2FA module.
outcome_notes: Shipped +2d. Stripe webhook idempotency and dunning were the tricky parts; the JWT+TOTP auth module is battle-tested and has been reused since.

name: traillog-2025
brief_text: TrailLog — last-mile delivery and fleet tracking for a courier startup. Live driver geolocation on a map with ETA to the customer, route history backed by PostGIS, and a notification dispatcher that fans out status changes over push and SMS. Realtime is the whole point. The reusable assets are the realtime map/geolocation tracking and the multi-channel notification dispatcher.
outcome_notes: Shipped +3d. WebSocket fan-out + PostGIS geo-queries are the reusable core; notifications were abstracted cleanly across push and SMS providers.
